message:
🐛 fix: Check event action before accessing label

Fixed condition to check github.event.action first to avoid
accessing github.event.label when it doesn't exist on opened events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ permissions:
 
 jobs:
   ai-fix:
-    if: github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested' || contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested')
+    if: (github.event.action == 'labeled' && github.event.label.name == 'ai-fix-requested') || (github.event.action == 'opened' && contains(github.event.issue.labels.*.name, 'ai-fix-requested'))
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
